chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1222 of 2024 Date: Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 10.09.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, AAG alongwith Abdul Fateh Mahar, Controller of Exam, Sukkur ******************** Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.2 & 3, which is taken on record, affirms though copy of the instant petition has already been provided to him; however, he seeks time to come prepared after having perused the petition at length. Be that as it may, the very purpose of this petition is to challenge excessive marks being given to the students, who have been declared in Grade-A1 and A, list of roll numbers of those students are available at page- 13 till middle of page-41. The answer copies of those students are requested to be preserved and sealed by Additional Registrar of this Court. At this juncture, learned Counsel representing the Respondents No.2 & 3 submits that one week's time may be granted in ordering such answer sheets. Let needful be done within seven days, thereafter Additional Registrar of this Court to ensure preservation of above referred answer sheets of aforesaid roll numbers by sealing the same. Adjourned to 26.09.2024. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of Additional Advocate General for compliance. Judge Judge
